header.openCart: {count, plural, =0 {Open donation cart} one {Open donation cart (# item)} other {Open donation cart (# items)}}

amountModal.title: Support this project
amountModal.directNote: 100% goes directly to {organization}’s verified wallet — no platform fee, and the network fee is covered for you.
amountModal.publicNote: Recorded as a public donation receipt anyone can audit.

cartPage.title: Cart
cartPage.emptyDescription: Find a project you love and add a donation — everything in your cart is paid together at checkout.
cartPage.feesNote: No platform fees — 100% goes to each recipient’s verified wallet. You can add an optional tip for GainForest at checkout.
cartPage.fixAmounts: Fix the highlighted amounts to continue.

checkoutPage.title: Checkout
checkoutPage.encouragement: Nice! Your donation supports community-led conservation.
checkoutPage.anonymousHint: Anonymous donations never appear publicly under your name — you can still see them on your own profile.
checkoutPage.signedOutNote: You are not signed in, so your donations will appear as anonymous.
checkoutPage.walletHint: Donations are paid in USDC on Ethereum. Connect your wallet to continue — network fees are covered for you.
checkoutPage.noWallet: No supported wallet was found. Install MetaMask or another compatible wallet to continue.
checkoutPage.tipDescription: GainForest charges no platform fees and covers the network fees for every donation. Tips from donors keep this service running.
checkoutPage.tipNudgeBody: Tips support GainForest to support land stewards to support nature!
checkoutPage.insufficientBalance: Your wallet does not have enough USDC for this total.
checkoutPage.multiApprovalNote: {count, plural, one {Your wallet will ask you to approve # payment.} other {Your wallet will ask you to approve # payments, one after another.}}
checkoutPage.footerNote: 100% of your donation goes to each recipient’s verified wallet — network fees are covered for you.
checkoutPage.blockedItems: Not ready to receive donations yet, so excluded from this payment: {titles}
checkoutPage.errorProfile: We couldn’t link this donation to your profile. Sign in again or donate anonymously.
checkoutPage.errorCannotReceive: This account cannot receive donations yet.
checkoutPage.errorAmount: Check the donation amount and try again.
checkoutPage.errorChanged: The payment details changed. Please restart the donation.
checkoutPage.errorTimeout: This payment is taking longer than expected and may still complete. Check your wallet’s recent activity before trying again so you don’t pay twice.
checkoutPage.tipFailed: The tip could not be completed — your donations were not affected.
checkoutPage.tipSkipped: The tip was skipped because no donation completed.
checkoutPage.successSummary: Your {amount} in donations was completed successfully.
checkoutPage.shareText: I just donated {amount} to support nature projects on GainForest: {url}
checkoutPage.singleApprovalNote: Your wallet will ask for a single approval covering the whole total. GainForest then forwards each donation to its recipient.

reward.moreProjects: {count, plural, one {# more project} other {# more projects}}
reward.tiltHint: Move over the card to catch the light
reward.overallSubtitle: {count, plural, one {# project backed} other {# projects backed}}
reward.collectedBody: Your cards are saved to My Cards.
reward.collectedSessionBody: Your cards are available in My Cards for this browser session.

testRegistry.title: UI experience registry
testRegistry.description: Safe, reusable previews of real GainForest flows, powered by mock data and blocked side effects.
testRegistry.availableDescription: Choose a flow to open its safe, fully interactive preview.
testRegistry.parityBody: Developers and AI agents: every experience here must render the production component itself. Mock only data and side effects—never copy or fork the interface. Any UI or UX change must affect the mock and live experience in the same way.
testRegistry.indexingNote: This route is public but excluded from search engines. Never place secrets or real personal data here.
testRegistry.experienceDescription: Walk through the current production donation experience with safe fixture data and no real payment.
testRegistry.projectPromptBody: Choose an amount, review the cart, connect the simulated wallet, and complete a safe preview payment.
testRegistry.mockProjectDescription: Restoring a living corridor between community forests and protected habitat.
testRegistry.myCardsDescription: Preview the collected-cards gallery, populated with sample collectibles.

myCards.title: My Cards
myCards.description: The holographic collectibles you've earned by supporting projects.
myCards.emptyBody: Support a project to earn your first collectible.
